title: Kaxoki's Xokian Pack
description: A datapack for cobblemon that adds 4 new regional forms and custom mons for the Beedrill, Slowking, Hypno, and Ledian lines
body:
![version1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7f50358bbd948392b2bb23748abe7878ca757bd.png)

# What does it add?
Kaxoki's Xokian Pack is a datapack for Cobblemon that adds two new regional forms, that being the Xokian Beedrill line and the Xokian Slowknight line. More custom mons and regional forms are being planned.

### Currently Implemented Pokemon:
- Xokian Weedle
- Xokian Kakuna
- Xokian Beedrill
- Xokian Slowpoke
- Xokian Slowbro
- Xokian Slowknight
- Xokian Drowzee
- Xokian Hypno
- Scaradian

### Planned Pokemon:
- Fairy Regi
- Ghost Skeleton: Rapidash and Ponyta

## New final Evolution Dex entries 
(currently broken in game, crashes. fixing currently.)

### Scaradian

![scaradian w/ shiny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ed9a87b139a8ea9db370c6c7ccf3f5fd5b13bbf.png)

Ledian, After being told by many trainers how bad it was, trains vigorously for days, weeks, and even months to become the strongest with a new found determination. As soon as it gains its true potential, it evolves. It protects and trains unevolved Ledian.

### Xokian Hypno

![xokian hypno w/ shiny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/961e32aea903c977b6e87a92d1178bfa1172255e.png)

After spending most of its life in darkness, it is pushed out of the cave it resided in and evolves as soon as the sun touches its skin. The newly evolved Hypno wanders until finding somewhere dark and damp, usually a bridge. It uses the last of its psychic abilities to give riddles to those who cross over its bridge. If the person quizzed gets it wrong, the Hypno will chase them away.

# 
## Installation

Just place the Pack into resource packs and data packs to function.

# PERMISSIONS
You must ask kaxokithe3rd on discord if you can use this on public servers, and private servers dont need explicit permission, though it would be apprieciated if asked!


This is my first datapack/custom cobblemon addon! While the models arent the best, and animations are kinda lacking for beedrill (since i made them), Im having a wonderful time making these and they are for my minecraft server im making! If you have any questions or concerns or problems, join the discord to ask!
